---
name: 📖 Configuration Update
about: Report an issue with or request updates to configuration files
title: "[CONFIG] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: ""
---

## 📝 Description
Clear description of the configuration issue or update needed.

## 🎯 Affected Component
Which configuration file or tool does this relate to?
- [ ] zsh configuration
- [ ] tmux configuration
- [ ] neovim configuration
- [ ] vscode configuration
- [ ] alacritty configuration
- [ ] git configuration
- [ ] gh configuration
- [ ] scripts
- [ ] other (please specify)

## 🔄 Current Behavior
How is it currently configured?

## 📋 Expected Behavior
How should it be configured?

## 📝 Proposed Changes
Describe the configuration changes or additions needed.

## 🖥️ Environment
- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS Ventura)
- **Tool Version**: (if applicable)
- **Installation Method**: (e.g., `install.sh`, manual)

## 📸 References
Link to relevant documentation, examples, or issues.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I've verified this is not already configured elsewhere
- [ ] This improves the user experience
- [ ] I can explain why this change is beneficial
